raw_consumer_statement: In XX/XX/XXXX, while on vacation in XXXX, I signed up for XXXX XXXX XXXX vacation club. After 3 days, I tried to cancel my membership but was told I must wait until I return home to the States. After returning home, I started getting monthly bills for the maintenance fee. Initially, I paid to avoid ruining my credit while I disputed canceling my membership with Barclays Bank. This dispute lasted over XXXX years, and during that time, I ended up paying over {$2000.00}. Eventually, I got frustrated and quit paying because this dispute was not getting resolved. In XX/XX/XXXX, I received a summons to go to court.
